Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Midway Handicap

1800m
Class: 3-Y-O & Up, BM72, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

Hard to split the top two selections. NATOYA coming off a win at Newcastle and first try at this distance, one of the main hopes. OCEANFRONT can't knock the form winning two in a row at Newcastle, hard to hold out. HIGHBORN HARRY has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level and placed last start at Newcastle on a soft track, looks threatening. STAY TUNED finished half a length back from the leader last start at Kembla Grange when fresh and racing back in town, don't dismiss.

Selections

  • 4. Natoya (5) $2.80
  • 3. Oceanfront (8) $9.50
  • 8. Highborn Harry (3) $9.00
  • 12. Stay Tuned (2) $12.00
